title: Scout step output
description: Per-requirement enrichment data produced by the Scout step. The engine's apply_merge_directive merges entries from `enrichments` into `input.brief.requirements` keyed by `id` so downstream steps see each requirement enriched with related files and contextual notes.

summary.description: 2-3 sentences orienting the implementer. High-level framing that does not duplicate per-requirement detail.

enrichments.description: One entry per R# in the brief. Merged into input.brief.requirements by id.

id.description: R# id from the brief (e.g. R1, R2).

related_files.description: Sibling files demonstrating the convention or pattern to follow.

context.description: Non-obvious findings, gotchas, and pointers the implementer needs.
